title: Recent Publication from Our Department: Dr. İlknur ŞİMŞEK
content:
Recent Publication from Our Department: Dr. İlknur ŞİMŞEK

The new book titled

by Dr. İlknur Şimşek has been released for sale by Vizyon Publishing House. In her book, Şimşek addresses social policy practices aimed at the preschool age group by examining the cases of the United Kingdom, Finland, and Türkiye. She states that the preschool age group, generally covering children between the ages of 0 and 5, has been included within the scope of social policies by today’s governments, and emphasizes that families are also closely affected by policies targeting the preschool period. In particular, Şimşek notes that with the increasing role of women in working life in the globalizing world, policies directed at the preschool age group have gained greater importance.

"ERKEN ÇOCUKLUK DÖNEMİNE YÖNELİK SOSYAL POLİTİKA UYGULAMALARI"
